title: Forms — Multi-Step Form Authoring MCP Surface
summary: Full form_* MCP namespace: Typeform-class multi-step forms, lead capture, NPS / CSAT surveys, intake forms. Reuses booking_flows table with kind='form'. 15+ field types, conditional logic with variables + hidden fields, structural validation, embed snippet generation via the embed.spideriq.ai/v1/loader.js loader (3 KB, inline + popup). Standalone route /f/{flow_id} (legacy /book/{flow_id} 301-redirects here). NOT in @spideriq/mcp-publish — only in kitchen-sink @spideriq/mcp@^1.20.1. Use whenever the user asks for 'a form', 'survey', 'questionnaire', 'NPS', 'lead capture', 'intake form', 'Typeform alternative'.
